L1_headline: SEM – Q4 2025 earnings and dividend declared. | 02/19/26
L2_brief: Select Medical Holdings reported Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results and announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0625 per share. The dividend is payable March 12, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. This is a routine earnings and dividend announcement with no merger-related implications.

L3_detailed.event: Company released Q4 and fiscal year 2025 earnings results and declared a quarterly cash dividend
L3_detailed.deal_implications: No merger or acquisition activity referenced in this filing; routine corporate disclosure
